M06 line reject action — marks receipt line REJECTED; UPPER_SNAKE per namespace policy
M06 line return action — records returned_quantity for rejected lines; UPPER_SNAKE per namespace policy
M06 close receipt action — closes receipt after receive/accept/reject/return; UPPER_SNAKE per namespace policy
M06 admin evidence upload — internal side evidence attachment; UPPER_SNAKE per namespace policy
M06 admin feedback reply — admin replies to supplier feedback thread; UPPER_SNAKE per namespace policy
